description_long: This is a tall, elegant porcelain vase with a flared rim and a bulbous midsection, decorated in a classic blue and white palette. The upper and lower sections feature intricate hand-painted scenes of figures in traditional attire, likely inspired by Chinese Ming or Qing dynasty porcelain. The midsection is adorned with stylized botanical motifs, including large leafy plants. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light softly, and the artwork is detailed with fine brushwork. The vase appears hollow and lightweight for its size, suitable for holding flowers or serving as a decorative centerpiece. Its overall form and decoration suggest it is intended for display in refined urban or public spaces.
description: A tall, blue-and-white porcelain vase with hand-painted scenes of figures and botanical motifs, featuring a flared rim and glossy finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights the flared rim and a scene with several figures in traditional dress, with detailed background elements.
description_view_1: This side shows the botanical motifs most prominently, with large leafy plants dominating the midsection and upper area.
description_view_2: This view presents another group of figures in a different arrangement, with more visible architectural or furniture elements.
description_view_3: This angle displays a mix of figures and potted plants, with the decorative narrative wrapping around the vase.
